text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I move through this clean, modern space toward what appears to be an exhibit focused on 'R+D—Responsive and rapidly evolving Development.' The sharp lines, glass, and bright lights create an atmosphere of possibility and progress. The bold graphics and interactive displays invite me to engage thoughtfully. Here, surrounded by representations of knowledge and innovation, I am compelled to reflect on the nature of research, discovery, and our relationship with technology. It feels both stimulating and slightly isolating—an immersion in ideas, yet distant from the warmth of human encounters.
